responseMessageContents.text:
All done. Here's the summary:

---

## Files Changed

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `worker/src/index.ts` | Modified — added `POST /api/create-payment` and `POST /api/verify-payment` endpoints |
| `expo/types/index.ts` | Modified — added `Invoice` interface and `InvoiceStatus` type |
| `expo/services/firestoreService.ts` | Modified — added invoice CRUD functions (`createInvoice`, `generateInvoiceNumber`, `fetchUserInvoices`, `fetchInvoiceByRequestId`, `updateRequestInvoiceId`) |
| `expo/services/paymentService.ts` | **New** — frontend service to call worker payment endpoints |
| `expo/app/payment/[requestId].tsx` | Modified — replaced mock timeout with real Tap API flow (create → redirect → verify) |
| `expo/app/invoices.tsx` | **New** — invoices screen with customer/provider tabs |
| `expo/app/request/[id].tsx` | Modified — added "View Invoice" button when payment is paid |
| `expo/app/(tabs)/profile/index.tsx` | Modified — added Invoices menu item |
| `expo/app/_layout.tsx` | Modified — registered invoices route |
| `expo/i18n/translations.ts` | Modified — added 30+ AR/EN translations for payment & invoices |

## API Endpoints Created

- **`POST /api/create-payment`** — Creates a Tap charge (test mode), returns `chargeId` + `paymentUrl`
- **`POST /api/verify-payment`** — Verifies charge status, returns `isPaid` + metadata

## Payment Flow (Now)

1. Customer clicks "Pay Now" on accepted request
2. Frontend calls worker `/api/create-payment` → worker calls Tap API using `TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST` (secret stays server-side)
3. User is redirected to Tap's hosted payment page
4. After completing payment, user returns and clicks "Verify Payment"
5. Frontend calls worker `/api/verify-payment` → worker checks Tap charge status
6. If `CAPTURED` → Firestore payment status updated to `paid` → invoice auto-created with VAT (15%) → invoice linked to request

## Security Confirmation

- ✅ `TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST` is only in the Cloudflare Worker environment — never exposed to frontend or Firestore
- ✅ No secret keys in React Native app code
- ✅ No secrets in Firestore documents

## Important: Worker Deployment

You need to set the `TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST` secret on your Cloudflare Worker:
```
wrangler secret put TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST
```
Then redeploy the worker for the payment endpoints to work.
